svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:

DataService" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="210" x="320" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="+ request(): Observable<T>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="210" x="320" y="245" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="21" edge="1" parent="1" source="6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;endArrow=block;endFill=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="22" edge="1" parent="1" source="10" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;endArrow=block;endFill=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;" value="ApiService" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="220" x="155" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="- realService: HttpClient
- base: string" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="220" x="155" y="385" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="+ ApiService(http: HttpClient)
+ checkAccess()
+ request(): Observable<T>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="220" x="155" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;" value="HttpClient" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="210" x="485" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="..." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="210" x="485" y="385" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="+ get(): Observable<T>

+ delete(): Observable<T>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="210" x="485" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" parent="1" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;fontSize=11;fillColor=#ffffc0;strokeColor=#999900;size=15;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="if (checkAccess()) {

}" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="155" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="24" edge="1" parent="1" source="14" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;endArrow=open;endFill=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="8"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="15" parent="1" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;fontSize=11;fillColor=#ffffc0;strokeColor=#999900;size=15;" value="realService = http" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="210" x="485" y="510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="25" edge="1" parent="1" source="15" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;endArrow=open;endFill=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="12"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8qQ_V2N6W18wMEfR7kLY-25" edge="1" parent="1" source="11" style="endArrow=diamondThin;endFill=0;endSize=24;html=1;rounded=0;entryX=1.001;entryY=0.379;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;startArrow=open;startFill=0;" target="7" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" width="160" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="460" y="500" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="440" y="430" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
